epigraph.quote: Gorgeous heather + yellow flowers. Black berries, blue sea. Beautiful.

per_stop.quote: Simon & Eve help bind hop stems around sticks & pull up weeds.
sparkling wine, supper. Gorgeous sunshine. Cambrian Mtns.
The coastal path was quite dangerous. Sheer drops. Gorgeous heather + yellow flowers. Black berries, blue sea. Beautiful.
We had a super bike ride. The rain only started again just as we got back!
